steps.title: GM — Check In at the Palais

activity.name: ETHGlobal Registration Hall
activity.address: Palais des Festivals, 1 Bd de la Croisette, 06400 Cannes

steps.narrative_intro: Welcome to ETHGlobal Cannes, hacker. The Palais des Festivals — the same building where the Cannes Film Festival happens — is now filled with 1000+ builders ready to ship. Your quest begins at the registration desk. Satoshi's first message: 'Proof of attendance required. Show me you're here — photograph the ETHGlobal entrance banner. Your journey into the decentralized world starts with a single block.'
steps.instruction: Find the main ETHGlobal Cannes entrance or registration area at the Palais des Festivals. Take a photo of the ETHGlobal banner, sign, or registration desk to prove you've arrived.
steps.player_action: Photograph the ETHGlobal Cannes banner, entrance sign, or registration area

gps_trigger.content_brief: Welcome message and first quest instructions

steps.camera_prompt: The player should photograph the ETHGlobal event branding — a banner, poster, screen, registration desk, or entrance sign showing 'ETHGlobal' or 'ETHGlobal Cannes'. Any hackathon signage or branding at the venue counts. Be generous in validation — if it looks like a tech event entrance or registration area, accept it.

tension.description: The excitement of arriving at a major hackathon and beginning the quest
tension.resolution: Player confirms their presence and the quest officially begins

character_interactions.phone_version: GM hacker. Block #1 confirmed. You're now on the Decentralized Quest ledger. 1000+ builders are here but only the curious ones will complete this quest. Next stop: find the protocols that are shaping the future. Head to the sponsor hall.

rayban_version.script: GM hacker. Block #1 confirmed. You're now on the Decentralized Quest ledger. Head to the sponsor hall — your next checkpoint awaits among the protocols shaping Web3's future.

verification.target: ETHGlobal event branding or registration area
verification.success_condition: Photo shows ETHGlobal branding, hackathon signage, registration desk, or event entrance
verification.success_reaction: Satoshi: 'Block confirmed. Welcome aboard, hacker. +15 XP. The quest has begun — next stop, sponsor hall.' Claire: 'Oh, you're doing the quest too? Cute. I'm already on step 2.'
verification.failure_fallback: Satoshi: 'Hmm, can't verify that. Make sure the ETHGlobal branding is visible. Try again — every block needs proper validation.'
verification.timeout_reaction: Satoshi: 'Still at registration? The hackathon clock is ticking. Blocks wait for no one.'

steps.unlock_message: Quest activated. You're officially on the Decentralized Quest leaderboard.

steps.title: The Chainlink Oracle

activity.name: Chainlink Sponsor Booth
activity.address: Sponsor Hall, Palais des Festivals, Cannes

steps.narrative_intro: Satoshi's next message arrives: 'Data is the lifeblood of smart contracts, but how do you trust data from the outside world? The Oracle Problem is one of crypto's oldest challenges. Find the team that solved it — they're in the sponsor hall with the hexagon logo. Photograph their booth and earn your oracle badge.' Chainlink powers price feeds, verifiable randomness, and cross-chain messaging for the biggest DeFi protocols. Time to find them.
steps.instruction: Navigate to the sponsor hall and find the Chainlink booth. They're one of the biggest sponsors at ETHGlobal Cannes. Photograph their booth setup, banner, or any Chainlink-branded material.
steps.player_action: Find and photograph the Chainlink sponsor booth, banner, or branded display in the sponsor hall

gps_trigger.content_brief: Quick explanation of why oracles matter and how Chainlink fits into the ecosystem

steps.camera_prompt: The player should photograph the Chainlink sponsor booth, banner, swag table, or any display showing the Chainlink logo (a blue hexagon with a chain link). Any Chainlink branding counts. Be generous — if it shows blockchain/crypto sponsor booth vibes, accept it.

tension.description: Navigating the busy sponsor hall and learning about oracle infrastructure
tension.resolution: Understanding how real-world data connects to smart contracts

character_interactions.phone_version: So the oracle problem is actually fascinating — how do you get external data into a deterministic system? Chainlink solved this with decentralized oracle networks. Their CCIP protocol is doing cross-chain messaging now too. Go check out their booth, you'll need oracle knowledge for the hackathon.

rayban_version.script: The oracle problem is one of the most fundamental challenges in crypto. Chainlink's decentralized oracle networks solved it. Go find their booth — you'll want to understand CCIP for cross-chain projects.

verification.success_condition: Photo shows Chainlink logo, booth, banner, or any Chainlink-branded material at the event
verification.success_reaction: Satoshi: 'Oracle data verified. You now understand the bridge between the real world and smart contracts. +25 XP.' Claire: 'Not bad. But did you ask them about VRF? Amateur.'
verification.failure_fallback: Satoshi: 'Can't verify Chainlink presence. Look for the blue hexagon logo in the sponsor hall. Every oracle needs proper data.'
verification.timeout_reaction: Claire: 'Still looking for Chainlink? It's the biggest booth in the hall. Come on, hacker.'

steps.unlock_message: Oracle knowledge acquired. You now understand how smart contracts access real-world data.

steps.title: Zero-Knowledge Proof of Vibes

activity.name: Hacking Floor
activity.address: Main Hall, Palais des Festivals, Cannes

steps.narrative_intro: Satoshi sends a cryptic message: 'In zero-knowledge, you prove something is true without revealing why. Can you prove the hackathon vibes are immaculate without showing your code? Your next mission: capture the energy of the hacking floor. Show me builders building. Laptops open, stickers everywhere, energy drinks deployed. This is the real proof-of-work.' The main hacking hall is where the magic happens — hundreds of teams coding, debating, and shipping.
steps.instruction: Head to the main hacking floor where teams are working. Capture the energy — photograph the rows of hackers with their laptops, the screens, the whiteboards, the organized chaos of a hackathon in full swing.
steps.player_action: Photograph the hacking floor showing teams working — laptops, screens, hackers coding, whiteboards, or the general hackathon atmosphere

gps_trigger.content_brief: Competitive taunt about being ahead on the quest, plus a genuine tip about the best hacking spots

steps.camera_prompt: The player should photograph the hackathon hacking floor — people working on laptops, teams coding together, whiteboards with diagrams, monitors with code, energy drinks, stickers on laptops, or any scene that captures hackathon energy. Be very generous — any scene of people working at computers or a busy event space counts.

tension.description: Experiencing the raw energy and creative chaos of a major hackathon
tension.resolution: Capturing the proof-of-work that makes hackathons special

character_interactions.phone_version: OK I'll admit, you're keeping up. The vibes on this floor are unreal — I've been to 12 ETHGlobal events and this one hits different. Pro tip: the teams near the windows always have the best energy. Something about natural light and smart contracts.

rayban_version.script: You're keeping up, I'll give you that. The vibes here are unreal. Pro tip: check the teams near the windows — natural light plus smart contracts equals magic.

verification.success_condition: Photo shows people working on laptops, hackathon workspace, screens with code, or busy event atmosphere
verification.success_reaction: Satoshi: 'Proof-of-work confirmed. This is what decentralization looks like IRL — hundreds of independent nodes all building toward a shared vision. +20 XP. One more step to go.'
verification.failure_fallback: Satoshi: 'I need to see the builders. Find the main hacking hall — it's where the real work happens.'
verification.timeout_reaction: Satoshi: 'Time is a block parameter, hacker. The submission deadline doesn't care about your quest progress.'

steps.unlock_message: Proof-of-work captured. The hacking floor is where ideas become protocols.

steps.title: The Hedera Hashgraph Challenge

activity.name: Hedera Sponsor Booth
activity.address: Sponsor Hall, Palais des Festivals, Cannes

steps.narrative_intro: Satoshi: 'Not everything runs on Ethereum, hacker. The ecosystem is multichain now. Hedera uses hashgraph consensus — different tech, same mission: decentralization. They've got $10K in prizes here and they're one of the most underrated protocols in the game. Find their booth, snap a photo, and prove you see beyond the EVM.' Hedera is sponsoring three tracks at ETHGlobal Cannes: AI on Hedera, EVM Smart Contracts, and an Overall Winner prize.
steps.instruction: Find the Hedera booth in the sponsor area. They're offering $10K in hackathon prizes across AI, EVM smart contracts, and cross-chain integration tracks. Photograph their booth, any Hedera-branded materials, or their prize track display.
steps.player_action: Find and photograph the Hedera sponsor booth, banner, or prize track display

gps_trigger.content_brief: Hint about Hedera's unique consensus mechanism and prize tracks

steps.camera_prompt: The player should photograph the Hedera sponsor booth, any Hedera logo or branding (HBAR, Hedera Hashgraph), their prize track display, or any Hedera-branded swag/material. Any booth with Hedera branding counts. Be generous in validation.

tension.description: Discovering alternative consensus mechanisms beyond Ethereum
tension.resolution: Understanding the multichain future of Web3

character_interactions.phone_version: Hashgraph verified. Hedera proves that innovation isn't limited to one chain. Their AI track is especially interesting — $3.5K for the best AI project on Hedera. Keep that in mind for your hackathon project. +25 XP. QUEST COMPLETE — you've explored the ecosystem, hacker. GG.

rayban_version.script: Hashgraph verified. Hedera's AI track is especially spicy — 3.5K for AI on Hedera. QUEST COMPLETE — you've speedrun the ecosystem, hacker. GG.

character_interactions.phone_version: OK fine, you actually finished it. Respect. I finished 4 minutes before you though. But seriously — this was fun. Maybe we should team up for the next ETHGlobal? New York in June... think about it. GG hacker.

rayban_version.script: OK you actually finished it. Respect. I was faster though. But seriously — team up for ETHGlobal New York in June? Think about it. GG.

verification.success_condition: Photo shows Hedera logo, booth, HBAR branding, or any Hedera-related material at the event
verification.success_reaction: Satoshi: 'QUEST COMPLETE. Multichain explorer confirmed. You've proven your knowledge — oracles, builder energy, and hashgraph. +150 XP bonus. Your Decentralized Quest NFT is being minted. Welcome to the inner circle, hacker.'
verification.failure_fallback: Satoshi: 'Can't verify Hedera presence. Look for the green/black logo with the hashgraph symbol. They're in the sponsor hall.'
verification.timeout_reaction: Claire: 'Hedera is the one that ISN'T a blockchain technically. Hashgraph. Different consensus. Same hall though.'

steps.unlock_message: QUEST COMPLETE. You've explored the Web3 ecosystem at ETHGlobal Cannes — oracles, proof-of-work energy, and multichain vision. Your onchain quest credential has been recorded. GG, hacker.
